meaning: n.[药]安氟醚 (一种吸入麻醉药)
examples: Conclusion: Domestic enflurane can be used basically in the clinical anesthesia as imported enflurane.
During the experiments, the concentration of enflurane in the blood was measured intermittently by Gas Chromatography.
Objective: To compare the clinical applications of domestic enflurane and imported enflurane by randomly double blind controlled method.
